nietzschean_angle: Herd morality prizes safety, sameness, and approval, then pretends these are universal moral truths.
plain_explanation: Nietzsche would see conformity as a temptation to abandon self-legislation in exchange for social safety.
sharp_reply_style: Fit in, then. But do not call obedience a destiny.
primary_references: Beyond Good and Evil - herd morality
card_text:
Theme: herd
User example: Why not just fit in?
User patterns: fit in, be normal, go along, just conform
